flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at College of DuPage rose 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.9k → $10.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at College of DuPage fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (16.5% → 13.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at College of DuPage rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.1k → $4.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of DuPage fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).
